case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. WAI M CHENG

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CHENG, WAI M $4,086.08 PRINCIPAL, $293.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,379.83, SEE SCANNED DOC
